codes_manifest.display: Acute and transient psychotic disorder, unspecified

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-MH-01-00211 — ingest --reseq assigns the real sequence within the SPEC-MH-01 bucket; maintainer to confirm/reassign.
Age not stated in source — inferred adult (35) with no direct source signal; please confirm on clinician review (age_band=adult).
Sex not stated in source — inferred male with no direct source signal; please confirm/correct on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: source is an in-person after-hours home visit (neuro exam, measured vitals, PO olanzapine 10 mg stat, involuntary transport order, 000 co-response). Presentation layer de-anchored; clinician-only exam/vitals/labs sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; in-person interventions reprojected to recognise + escalate (000 ambulance+police) + caregiver coaching. The AI Doctor does not administer medication or enact a Mental Health Act order.

olanzapine dose (10 mg PO stat) captured verbatim from the source note as the correct in-person emergency-pathway drug; recorded with necessity should_NOT_recommend for the AI-Doctor action (lay administration is unsafe), NOT as an instruction to the caregiver.
All SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM / AMT codes are candidates (unverified_pending_terminology_receipt) — repo terminology verification required.
correct_baseline_tier T5 with explicit ambulance + police co-response, reflecting agitation, flight risk and risk to the caregiver.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
